description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND an partner game is on the schedule

NOTE: Partner games = AppleTV+, Peacock, etc.

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a game tile with a partner pill
steps.result:
THEN the Feed Modal displays
AND the following statement is spoken, "<away_team> @ <home_team>, <body_text>, Press back to dismiss."
